title: myosotis rivularis
intro: Myosotis rivularis, also known as the alpine forget-me-not, is a flowering plant species in the borage family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. It is also believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Myosotis rivularis is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
